---
title: "partitioning SSm"
format: revealjs
---


![](media/dsr2_fig_11_07_partitioning_variance_01.png){fig-align="center" height=600}

## 

![](media/dsr2_fig_11_07_partitioning_variance_02.png){fig-align="center" height=600}

## 

![](media/dsr2_fig_11_07_partitioning_variance_03.png){fig-align="center" height=600}



## 

![](media/dsr2_fig_11_08_3_groups_a_01.svg){fig-align="center" height=600}




## 

![](media/dsr2_fig_11_08_3_groups_a_02.svg){fig-align="center" height=600}


## 

![](media/dsr2_fig_11_08_3_groups_a_03.svg){fig-align="center" height=600}


## 

![](media/dsr2_fig_11_08_3_groups_a_04.svg){fig-align="center" height=600}

## 

![](media/dsr2_fig_11_09_3_groups_a_01.svg){fig-align="center" height=600}

## 

![](media/dsr2_fig_11_09_3_groups_a_02.svg){fig-align="center" height=600}

## 

![](media/dsr2_fig_11_09_3_groups_a_03.svg){fig-align="center" height=600}

## 

![](media/dsr2_fig_11_09_3_groups_a_04.svg){fig-align="center" height=600}
